MILITARY STUDIES MINOR

Program Director: Colonel Nathan Rabe

The minor in Military Studies provides students with the opportunity to study the U.S. military and more speciﬁcally the U.S. Air Force. Students seeking a minor in Military Studies are not required to be members of the Air Force ROTC program. This minor enables students to develop a secondary academic experience which may serve them in the future. The minor may also alert potential employers to the student's knowledge in a minor ﬁeld of study.

The Military Studies minor consists of the courses identiﬁed in the Requirements section, and is open to any student at the University of Maryland. Students seeking a minor in Military Studies must be approved by the Director of Air Force ROTC and be advised by instructional personnel in that ofﬁce.
